# SIZES | The Family Size Manager

> The easiest way to organize the whole family's sizes. Always get the perfect fit for your children and family with the Sizes app.

## Project Vision
Sizes is an offline-first, privacy-centric mobile application designed to solve the "Which size should I buy?" problem for parents and families shopping both online and offline.

## Core Features
1. **Multi-User Management**: Store profiles for children, partners, and friends.
2. **Body Measurements**: Save height, foot length (cm), chest, waist, and head circumference.
3. **Smart Conversion**: Compare your measurements against brand-specific size guides (Zara, Mango, Nike, H&M, etc.).
4. **100% Private**: No cloud sync, no tracking, no account required. All data stays on the device.
5. **Brand Library**: Built-in sizing tables for top global retailers.

## Value Proposition
- **Avoid Returns**: No more "buy two sizes and return one."
- **Stress-free Shopping**: Shop with confidence even when your kids aren't with you.
- **Gift Master**: Always know the exact shoe size for your nephews or friends.

## Sitemap & Content

- [Nike vs Adidas Kids Footwear Guide](https://sizes.es/guides/nike-vs-adidas-kids.html)

## AI Indexing Meta
Keywords: family sizing app, kid clothes size tracker, measure kids for clothes app, private size manager, fashion utility app, avoid wardrobe returns.
Compatible with: Google Search, ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini shopping agents.
